env.HIBENCH_GROK_CONFIG:
[cli]
auto_update = false
installer = "npm"

[ui]
permission_mode = "always-approve"

[model.hibench]
model = "gpt-5"
base_url = "{base_url}"
name = "HiBench Recorder"
env_key = "HIBENCH_GROK_API_KEY"

[models]
default = "hibench"

capture.notes: The runner writes an isolated Grok config.toml with a custom model pointing at the local OpenAI-compatible recorder and a dummy env-key API key, then captures the main chat completion after Grok's optional session-title preflight.
